examples: He writes under the name of Nimrod.
Old Nimrod, here, thinks Harve drank too much; and this from such as Nimrod and me!
Thus Nimrod ascribed to himself power and authority over his fellow man and ruled them.
He also said it was "sad" the government had axed plans for new Nimrod surveillance aircraft.
By mid-February all the stores were ashore, and on 28 February the Nimrod set sail northwards.
